name: Spinach Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 10 oz pkgs frozen spinach, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to packaged directions until just tender; drain and rinse.
2. In a saucepan, melt butter; stir in flour and cook, stirring, for one minute.
3. Gradually add milk and bring to a boil. Cook until thick, stirring constantly.
4. Add seasonings and spinach. Stir and remove from heat.
5. In a greased baking dish, arrange half of noodles, and sprinkle with half of cheese.
6. Spoon the spinach mixture over the cheese.
7. Add another layer of noodles and sprinkle with the rest of cheese.
8. Cover, and bake at 400 degrees for 15 minutes.
9. Remove cover and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
